name: Varen Zalenna
equipment: Oil ×10, parchment ×10, ink, book, tinderbox, perfume, backpack
notes: Elf (Drow lineage) Wizard 6 — Diviner. Darkvision 120 ft. Fey Ancestry; Trance; immune to magical sleep. PORTENT: roll 2d20 after each Long Rest — replace any d20 Test you can see (Varen's signature; the mark on his hand is Eilistraee's handhold, see notes/pc-varen). Expert Divination: L2+ Divination spell regains a lower slot. Arcane Recovery 1/LR (3 slot levels on a short rest). Faerie Fire + Dancing Lights + Darkness 1/LR each (drow lineage). Spell DC 15, atk +7. Keen Mind + Skilled feats (Arcana/History expertise). Imported from D&D Beyond sheet 2026-07-10.
